case_title: JIM LASTRA et al VS. KIRIT PATEL et al

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, there being no appearance nor objection, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Rita Arlene Howell CSR# 2542. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2007 Continued To Sep-24-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2007 Continued To Jun-25-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs in Propria Persona are sanctioned $350.00 each, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/25/2007 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Patty Van Steenberge CSR# 1742. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-26-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
